scope: Verify five user-supplied Binance App CEX wallet aggregation TXID jumps and reconstruct the complete bounded AKE-to-Gate 1 destination subset inside a complete all-AKE Transfer window.

binance_app_screenshot.visible_module: CEX 钱包归集资金动态

all_token_transfer_coverage.scope_note: This coverage query contains every AKE Transfer log in the requested block window and is the coverage basis for replay.

cross_batch_observations.interpretation: Gate 5 to Gate 1 is verified CEX-internal aggregation. Repeated sources and the rapid multi-source single-destination sequence support a coordinated sweep candidate for the other 46 rows, while their source ownership and entity linkage remain unresolved.

evidence_layers.official: The user-supplied Binance App screenshot and direct TXID jumps identify the five visible CEX wallet aggregation rows.
evidence_layers.onchain: BSC canonical transactions, receipts, complete all-token Transfer-window coverage, block timestamps, token decimals, and the Gate 1 destination are verified.
evidence_layers.market: No market direction is inferred from the screenshot price.
evidence_layers.inference: One Gate 5 to Gate 1 row is verified internal. The other 46 rows have a coordinated batch pattern while source ownership, economic external inflow, and sale intent remain unresolved.

classification.current_runtime_reason: AKE is absent from config/current_alpha_watchlist.json at review time; this is historical evidence, not a production observation.
